@@ -492,7 +492,7 @@ {"id":"brenner_bot-khl4","title":"Bug: build-search-index __dirname uses URL.pathname (Windows/escaped paths)","description":"Problem: apps/web/scripts/build-search-index.ts sets __dirname = new URL('.', import.meta.url).pathname. On Windows this produces paths like /C:/... and can include percent-encoding, which can break resolve/join and cause prebuild/build failures. Fix: use fileURLToPath(import.meta.url) + dirname to derive a real filesystem path. Done when: bun run prebuild/build works on Windows and paths are decoded.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"PinkStone","created_at":"2025-12-30T11:17:38.528897244-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T11:42:08.139996801-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T11:42:08.139996801-05:00","close_reason":"Completed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-khl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-719","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-30T11:17:38.553988033-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-khy","title":"Bug: brenner CLI mail send should auto-register sender","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-30T03:47:04.286634597-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T03:57:39.402885375-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T03:57:39.402885375-05:00","close_reason":"Fixed: brenner.ts mail send now auto-ensures project, auto-registers sender when missing, and adopts server-assigned name when auto-generated; exits non-zero on tool error.","comments":[{"id":2,"issue_id":"brenner_bot-khy","author":"ubuntu","text":"Repro: `./brenner.ts mail send --sender ...` fails with 'Agent not found' unless you pre-register via MCP register_agent. Desired: make `mail send` auto-run ensure_project + register_agent (best-effort, idempotent) before send_message, similar to `session start` and web API route.","created_at":"2025-12-30T08:47:48Z"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-knbw","title":"E2E Tests: Multi-Agent Orchestration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-01T21:00:58.669901063-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-01T21:00:58.669901063-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-knbw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-h909","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-01T21:02:29.543143867-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-knbw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-j90h","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-01T21:02:49.961424896-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} -{"id":"brenner_bot-kpso","title":"Landing Page: Tutorial CTA Integration","description":"# Purpose Add a prominent call-to-action for the tutorial system on the brennerbot.org landing page. This is the primary discovery mechanism — users should naturally find the tutorial after understanding what BrennerBot is. --- # Placement Rationale **Constraint**: No new navbar item (already crowded with Corpus, Distillations, Method, Operators, Glossary, Sessions) **Solution**: Prominent section on landing page **Location**: After the WhatIsThis component, before the feature cards grid **Rationale**: 1. WhatIsThis explains what BrennerBot is 2. Tutorial CTA offers to teach how to USE it 3. Feature cards provide alternatives for exploration 4. This creates a natural funnel: Learn → Apply → Explore --- # Design Specification ## Visual Treatment Use success accent color (green) to stand out from the primary/accent colors used elsewhere. This signals "action available" and creates visual hierarchy. **Card Design**: \`\`\` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ [AcademicCap Icon] │ │ │ │ Ready to Apply the Method? │ │ Three learning paths from quick start to multi-agent │ │ orchestration. Apply Brenner's scientific method to your │ │ own research questions. │ │ │ │ [~30 min Quick Start] [Agent-Assisted] [Multi-Agent Cockpit] │ │ │ │ Start Tutorial → │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ \`\`\` **Styling Details**: - Border: border-success/30, hover:border-success/50 - Background: gradient from success/5 via success/10 to primary/5 - Icon: Academic cap or graduation cap, size-14, rounded-2xl - Title: text-xl font-semibold - Description: text-muted-foreground - Badges: variant="outline", text-xs - CTA: text-success font-medium with arrow icon --- # Implementation **File**: apps/web/src/app/page.tsx **Component** (inline or extracted): \`\`\`tsx {/* Tutorial CTA - After WhatIsThis */}
{/* Background orbs */}

Ready to Apply the Method?

Three learning paths from quick start to multi-agent orchestration. Apply Brenner's scientific method to your own research questions.

~30 min Quick Start Agent-Assisted Multi-Agent Cockpit
Start Tutorial
\`\`\` --- # Accessibility - Link wraps entire card (large touch target) - Descriptive link text via content - Focus-visible ring for keyboard nav - Sufficient color contrast --- # A/B Testing Consideration (Future) If analytics show low click-through: 1. Try moving above WhatIsThis 2. Try more urgent copy ("Start now →") 3. Try showing time savings ("Save hours of research setup") --- # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Tutorial CTA visible on landing page - [ ] Positioned after WhatIsThis section - [ ] Uses success accent color scheme - [ ] Three path badges visible - [ ] Link navigates to /tutorial - [ ] Mobile-responsive design - [ ] Hover/focus states working - [ ] Dark mode verified","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-03T14:53:51.471356081-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-03T14:53:51.471356081-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-kpso","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-do3j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-03T14:54:04.56745761-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} +{"id":"brenner_bot-kpso","title":"Landing Page: Tutorial CTA Integration","description":"# Purpose Add a prominent call-to-action for the tutorial system on the brennerbot.org landing page.
